---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for MDMA
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the gap you have identified. Example: "When building approval workflows, I need to ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen. If you have a specific API or MDMA syntax in mind, include an example:

```mdma
id: example
type: your-proposed-component
# ...
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they fall short.

## Affected Package(s)

Which package(s) would this feature belong to?

- [ ] `@mobile-reality/mdma-spec` (new schema / type)
- [ ] `@mobile-reality/mdma-parser` (parsing behavior)
- [ ] `@mobile-reality/mdma-runtime` (state, events, policy)
- [ ] `@mobile-reality/mdma-attachables-core` (new or modified component handler)
- [ ] `@mobile-reality/mdma-renderer-react` (rendering)
- [ ] `@mobile-reality/mdma-prompt-pack` (AI authoring)
- [ ] Blueprints
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional Context

Add mockups, links to related issues, or references to similar features in other tools.
